creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:41:20 2014
New Revision: 353394
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353394
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353394/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189283
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/misc/p5-Array-Diff/Makefile

Modified: head/misc/p5-Array-Diff/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/p5-Array-Diff/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:16 2014	(r353393)
+++ head/misc/p5-Array-Diff/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:41:20 2014	(r353394)
@@ -7,12 +7,15 @@ CATEGORIES=	misc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Diff two arrays
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Algorithm-Diff>=1.19:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Algorithm-Diff \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Algorithm-Diff>=1.19:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Algorithm-Diff \
 		p5-Class-Accessor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor
-BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
